text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:08:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    biology/L-Breeder    Makefile 
    biology/adun         Makefile 
    biology/artemis      Makefile 
    biology/biococoa     Makefile 
    biology/biojava      Makefile 
    biology/boinc-simap  Makefile

    biology/jalview      Makefile 
    biology/lsysexp      Makefile 
    biology/treeviewx    Makefile 
    biology/xdrawchem    Makefile 
    biology/xmolwt       Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
